_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Define and enforce enterprise data quality standards, including dimensional targets, measurement processes, issue triage procedures, and escalation thresholds.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Task DQ-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.578), DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.565).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [quality, standards]. NICE-only terms [implement, new, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, define, dimensional, enforce, enterprise, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.915, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.047 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Implement new system quality standards" and "Define and enforce enterprise data quality standards, including dimensional targ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.597 ≈ STS 0.644 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [quality, standards] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [quality, standards]. NICE-only: [implement, new, system]. WIDAI-only: [data, define, dimensional, enforce, enterprise, escalation].
